infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: BluCal uses your camera to scan food barcodes and analyze meals with BluAI.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: BluCal accesses your photos so you can upload a meal photo to BluAI.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: BluCal uses your microphone for voice food logging.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: BluCal reads your weight and workout data to improve your macro targets.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: BluCal writes your nutrition data to Apple Health.

plugins._comment: TODO: ./assets/notification-icon.png does not exist yet — add a 96x96 PNG before the App Store build.
